/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/rsatool.dir/src/utils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rsatool.dir/src/rsa_keygen.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rsatool.dir/src/rsa_encrypt.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rsatool.dir/src/rsa_decrypt.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rsatool.dir/src/benchmarker.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rsatool.dir/src/rsatool.cpp.o -o rsatool  -lcryptopp
